commit.message:
feat: intelligent reminder lead time based on task type

- Meeting/appointment: remind 30 min before (not at start time)
- Payment/bills: remind 3 days before
- Deadline/submission: remind 1 day before
- Travel/flight: remind 2 hours before
- Medical appointment: remind 1 hour before
- Other timed tasks: remind 15 min before
- No time specified: remind at 9am on due date

Also: reminder confirmation always shows actual remind time vs due time

commit.message:
fix(tiering): fix flaky op_manager_test by waiting for cancelled stash IOs (#6852)

WaitForPendingStashes only checked pending_stash_cnt, which tracks
version-matching stash completions. Cancelled stash IOs (superseded
by newer stashes for the same id) could still be in flight, leaving
allocated_bytes inflated when the assertion ran. Also wait for
pending_ops to drain so all IO callbacks (including cancellation
frees) complete before checking allocated_bytes.

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Self-contained single-page fitness & habit tracker app.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Fix online multiplayer disconnection and reconnection reliability

Prevents mid-game disconnects from killing rooms and makes reconnection
actually work. Key issues: checkAllHumansGone was deleting rooms instantly
when players temporarily disconnected, reconnectTokens were being cleared
making rejoin impossible, and unhandled exceptions could crash the server
taking down all rooms.

Preventative: websocket-only transport, tighter ping/pong, try-catch on
all socket handlers and bot/timer callbacks, uncaught exception handler.
Recovery: grace period preserves rooms, tokens survive bot replacement,
players can reclaim bot-replaced slots, auto-reconnect on join page.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: remove dead code that computed levies with default base only

The old chart_svg, daily_rows_html, weekly_rows_html, and monthly_rows_html
blocks (80+ lines) were computed with the $0.80 default base before
build_page() runs. Since build_page() recalculates everything per-config,
these were unused dead code. Extracted shared chart layout constants
(chart_w, chart_h, pad_*, full_dates, short_dates, tgps, hit_w) that
build_page() still needs.

Verified both levy configs render correctly:
- Global ($0.80): 52.69% daily
- Dollar ($1.00): 36.15% daily

commit.message:
perf(status): replace DOM timeline with Canvas rendering (~60k → ~150 nodes)

The 24h timeline rendered 26 services × 288 slots × ~7 DOM elements each
(~52k nodes + 7,488 hidden tooltips). This caused time windows to not render
visibly at 5-minute resolution.

Changes:
- CanvasTimelineBar: single <canvas> per service replaces 288 <div> SlotCells
  - ResizeObserver + devicePixelRatio-aware for crisp HiDPI rendering
  - Reads status colors from CSS custom properties (theme-aware)
  - MutationObserver on <html data-theme> for instant theme-switch redraw
  - Hover highlights slot at +15% lightness, delegates to shared tooltip
- SharedTooltip: single createPortal tooltip (was 7,488 hidden instances)
  - position:fixed with viewport edge clamping
- useTimelineData hook: extracted data layer with visibility-based pause
  - Pauses 60s polling when tab hidden, refreshes on focus
  - Stale data preservation (no flash to skeleton on refetch)
- Timeline.tsx: orchestrator rewrite using new components
  - Sparse data check + groups moved to useMemo
  - SlotCell and old TimelineBar removed

Accessibility preserved: role="img" + aria-label + sr-only span per canvas.
E2E tests pass unchanged (API-level + generic selectors).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

repository.name: enclii

commit.message:
refactor: 移除 PID orphan recovery，信任 gateway session 存活 (#40)

经测试验证：gateway agent session 在 CLI 进程被 kill 后仍然存活。
因此 dispatcher 重启时不需要 reset in-flight zouzhe，agent 会
自行通过 chaoting done/fail 汇报结果，check_timeouts 作为兜底。

- 删除 _is_process_alive / recover_orphans（~60 行）
- dispatch_agent 去掉 PID 记录/清除逻辑（~30 行）
- 新增 _log_inflight_on_startup 仅记录日志
- init_db.py 移除 assigned_agent_pid 列

Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

commit.message:
fix(e2e): use data-keyboard-ready signal for reliable hydration wait

SSR renders finding rows before React effects run, so keyboard handlers
may not be registered when E2E test presses 'j'. Add data-keyboard-ready
attribute set by the registration useEffect, and wait for it in both
waitForReviewPageHydrated helper and keyboard E1 test directly.

commit.message:
fix: commit cmd/mm-repro entrypoint and fix .gitignore

The .gitignore entry 'mm-repro' was matching and silently excluding
the cmd/mm-repro/ directory, causing 'go install' to fail with
"module found, but does not contain package". Anchored the pattern
to /mm-repro (root only) so it only ignores the compiled binary,
not the source package directory.

commit.message:
refactor: 实时数据源从 keepUpToDate K线改为 reqTickByTickData 逐Tick

核心动机：
  reqHistoricalData(keepUpToDate=True) 以批量更新推送，批次内价格
  短暂突破止损阈值后回升时 close>low，无法被原条件捕获。
  改用逐Tick接收，每笔成交独立触发止损检测，彻底消除批次盲区。

新架构：
  1. 历史数据（一次性）
     fetch_historical_bars(keepUpToDate=False) 拉取已完成K线，
     初始化 K-1/K-2 缓冲区，供止损阈值计算使用。

  2. 实时数据（持续）
     subscribe_ticks() → reqTickByTickData('Last')
     每批 TCP 数据触发 ticker.updateEvent，
     on_ticker_update() 遍历 ticker.tickByTicks 逐 tick 处理。

  3. K线合成（新增 TickBarBuilder）
     按 UTC epoch 整除对齐时间边界，将逐 tick 聚合为任意周期 K 线。
     on_tick() 返回 has_new_bar=True 时推入 buffer.completed 并触发
     抄底/摸顶检查；每个 tick 结束后调用 _check_and_fire() 检测止损。

变更文件：
  core/kline_manager.py — 新增 TickBarBuilder 类、_PERIOD_SECONDS 映射
  adapters/ib_client.py — 新增 fetch_historical_bars/subscribe_ticks/cancel_ticks，
                          移除 subscribe_bars/cancel_bars
  core/engine.py       — on_bars_update → on_ticker_update；
                         _init_monitor/_resubscribe_all/stop 适配新接口；
                         ContractMonitor 新增 ticker/_tick_builder/_tick_callback 字段

commit.message:
refactor: clutch-describe-table-at-point errors when not on table name

Previously fell back to completing-read when point was not on a symbol,
duplicating C-c C-j's behaviour. Now signals user-error instead, keeping
the command's semantics precise: it only acts on the symbol at point.
Use C-c C-j + Embark (d) or the transient menu (D) for prompted describe.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add max_reassign_fraction guard, boundary refinement, and multi-disease union fix

- label_correction: add max_reassign_fraction (default 0.20) to prevent large
  fragments from being wrongly reassigned via imprecise atlas registration;
  second tier allows medium fragments (IoC>=0.5, size<0.5x dominant)
- atlas_pipeline: wire max_reassign_fraction through run_atlas_pipeline;
  add boundary_log to result; add per-voxel boundary refinement step (refine_all_boundaries);
  default registration_mode changed to per_structure; add do_boundary_refinement flag
- anatomy_priors: fix multi-disease union bug — first active disease replaces
  the normal default, subsequent diseases union rather than overwrite
- Add boundary_refinement.py, sanity_check.py script, and boundary refinement tests

Fix large script hang: HTTP/1.1 + exec(open()) pattern

bodies. Added exec(open()) workaround to skill docs for large scripts.

split children) before removing the tournoi_ext record.
